name: Tekkit Legends
author: aevum@decess.us
description:
The ancient power of Tekkits past return in this legendary pack! Wield the philosopher's stone, ride the rails, breed the bees, and much, much more! This pack will remind you of what you've always loved about Tekkit, while bringing you new mods to discover and enjoy!

https://www.technicpack.net/modpack/tekkit-legends.735902

variables.name: Modpack Version
variables.description: Version of the modpack to use

install.script:
#!/bin/ash
# Forge Installation Script
#
# Server Files: /mnt/server

cd /mnt/server

curl -sS https://servers.technicpack.net/Technic/servers/tekkit-legends/Tekkit_Legends_Server_v$MODPACK_VERSION.zip -o TekkitLegends_$MODPACK_VERSION.zip

unzip TekkitLegends_$MODPACK_VERSION.zip

rm -rf TekkitLegends_$MODPACK_VERSION.zip

## install end
echo "-----------------------------------------"
echo "Installation completed..."
echo "-----------------------------------------"
